list.name: Changes
list.comment:
TEST: Temporary file
Temporary file added to mantain the folder, to upload the projects

C:\Users\sjayasur\OneDrive - NTT DATA EMEAL\Desktop\PC\Tirocinio\Application-Cloud-Developer\Stage - NTT Data\Fondamenti Java\Lezione 18\Teoria

task.summary: Default task

BATCH: Resolved migration conflicts with repo
1. Fixed the problem with the name's of the folder that they prevented the correct resolution
2. Now allow the possibility to clone the repo correctly with no more mistakes
3. Finally solved any issues between the systems: Linux (Ubuntu) and Windows
REMOVE: Deleting the '.idea' file not need it
TEST: working branch correctly
DELETE: Deleting the TEST's
DELETE: Deleting more file and .idea file

FEAT: Spring Boot - GestionaleLibreria
- Included all the packages wiht the application logic
- Refactor of the previous maven project using Spring Boot, allocated a new package 'controller'

FEAT: Uploading the lesson about Spring Boot & Exception Handler
- Need to ultime the GestionaleLibri with the missing ExceptionHanlder

FEAT: Spring Boot - Data JPA and MySQL bridge DB
- Refactor of the Spring Boot, using JPA - Refactor of the Spring Boot, using MySQL extension.
- For using the MySQL extension DB please download from the MySQL official site
FEAT: Uploading the PDF lesson slide Spring JPA and MySQL

DELETE: Removing extra folder with the bad notation
- Removing the folder 'Java' for inconsistence name
- Using the same folder 'Java_' that solved the problem to be cloned

FEAT: ErorreDTO template for the LibroExceptionHandler
A brief template Exeception to manage the execption status

FEAT: LibroExceptionHandler the Global Manager
Centralized the Exception Management with the using of ErroreDTO template
FEAT: ErroreDTO Template included
FEAT: LibroExceptionHandler Global Handler included

REFACTOR: Included the method trovaPerPrezzoMaggiore
Inluded into the: CONTROLLER,REPOSITORY and SERVICE

FEAT: Project Spring Boot + JPA + MySQL
Here the last project of formation in the factory about fundaments of JAVA.
Simple Project, with many exception with a general handler and everything call via JPA + Hibernate link to a 'volume' (storage) MySQL DB.
FEAT: Prompt PDF of the Project verifica_jpa

FEAT: Prompt PDF of the Project CatalogoLibri
Uploading the missing PDF prompt of the project CatalogoLibri, step-by-step with the PDF

FEAT: AutoreNonEsistenteException managed
Including the AutoreNonEsistenteException to manage the case of null or not found author on the system

FEAT: CategoriaNonIdoneaException managed
Including the CategoriaNonIdoneaException to manage the case of null or not found ENUM String on CatalogoLibro on the system

FEAT: PrezzoNonIdoneoException managed
Including the PrezzoNonIdoneoException to manage the case of a number < 0 or with not cohesion on the system

FIX: Including the new Exception to be Handled from the Master
Including the Exception to be managed into the GestionaleHandlerException, here the new add:
1. PrezzoNonIdoneoException 2. AutoreNonEsistenteException 3. CategoriaNonIdoneaException

FIX: Including the new Exception to be Handled from the Master
Including the Exception to be managed into the GestionaleHandlerException, here the new add:
1. PrezzoNonIdoneoException 2. AutoreNonEsistenteException 3. CategoriaNonIdoneaException

FIX: Including the manage cases Validation with new Exception
Including the validation of Exception to be managed into the LibroService

MERGE: Formazione folder with Fondamenti Java & MySQL | PSQL
Merging into a unique file the training into job, to distinguish the training part and the Progetti one

TEST: Temporary file
Temporary file added to mantain the folder, to upload the projects

MESSAGE.value: REMOVE: Deleting the '.idea' file not need it
TEST: working branch correctly
DELETE: Deleting the TEST's
DELETE: Deleting more file and .idea file

FEAT: Spring Boot - GestionaleLibreria
- Included all the packages wiht the application logic
- Refactor of the previous maven project using Spring Boot, allocated a new package 'controller'

FEAT: Uploading the lesson about Spring Boot & Exception Handler
- Need to ultime the GestionaleLibri with the missing ExceptionHanlder

FEAT: Spring Boot - Data JPA and MySQL bridge DB
- Refactor of the Spring Boot, using JPA - Refactor of the Spring Boot, using MySQL extension.
- For using the MySQL extension DB please download from the MySQL official site
FEAT: Uploading the PDF lesson slide Spring JPA and MySQL

DELETE: Removing extra folder with the bad notation
- Removing the folder 'Java' for inconsistence name
- Using the same folder 'Java_' that solved the problem to be cloned

FEAT: ErorreDTO template for the LibroExceptionHandler
A brief template Exeception to manage the execption status

FEAT: LibroExceptionHandler the Global Manager
Centralized the Exception Management with the using of ErroreDTO template
FEAT: ErroreDTO Template included
FEAT: LibroExceptionHandler Global Handler included

REFACTOR: Included the method trovaPerPrezzoMaggiore
Inluded into the: CONTROLLER,REPOSITORY and SERVICE

FEAT: Project Spring Boot + JPA + MySQL
Here the last project of formation in the factory about fundaments of JAVA.
Simple Project, with many exception with a general handler and everything call via JPA + Hibernate link to a 'volume' (storage) MySQL DB.
FEAT: Prompt PDF of the Project verifica_jpa

FEAT: Prompt PDF of the Project CatalogoLibri
Uploading the missing PDF prompt of the project CatalogoLibri, step-by-step with the PDF

FEAT: AutoreNonEsistenteException managed
Including the AutoreNonEsistenteException to manage the case of null or not found author on the system

FEAT: CategoriaNonIdoneaException managed
Including the CategoriaNonIdoneaException to manage the case of null or not found ENUM String on CatalogoLibro on the system

FEAT: PrezzoNonIdoneoException managed
Including the PrezzoNonIdoneoException to manage the case of a number < 0 or with not cohesion on the system

FIX: Including the new Exception to be Handled from the Master & Minor Fix
In one hand included the Exception to be managed into the GestionaleHandlerException, on the other hand fixed the HttpStatus and the @PathVariable correctly in the controller.
Sum up of what we add:
1. PrezzoNonIdoneoException 2. AutoreNonEsistenteException 3. CategoriaNonIdoneaException 4. HttpStatus from GONE to OK 5. @PathVariable changed from 'categoria' to correct name 'c'

FIX: Including the new Exception to be Handled from the Master
Including the Exception to be managed into the GestionaleHandlerException, here the new add:
1. PrezzoNonIdoneoException 2. AutoreNonEsistenteException 3. CategoriaNonIdoneaException

FIX: Including the manage cases Validation with new Exception
Including the validation of Exception to be managed into the LibroService

MERGE: Formazione folder with Fondamenti Java & MySQL | PSQL
Merging into a unique file the training into job, to distinguish the training part and the Progetti one

TEST: Temporary file
Temporary file added to mantain the folder, to upload the projects
